inputs.text: A melancholic young woman with dark brown long straight black hair standing in a cozy bookstore bathed in warm amber light, fox-like eyes gazing downward with poetic sadness, slim face with flawless porcelain skin and subtle smoky makeup, wearing a fitted black crop top and camel high-waisted wide-leg pants, half body waist up composition, shot on 35mm lens environmental portrait, silhouette against a glowing vintage lamp behind her, cross lighting from two sides casting dramatic shadows across towering bookshelves, one hand resting on a leather-bound spine, dust particles floating in golden light beams, shallow depth of field, editorial fashion photography, SDXL vivid chromatic colors with rich warm tones and deep burgundy shadows, Korean idol aesthetic, absolutely stunning
lowres, deformed, blurry, watermark, ugly, low quality
